agents.name: Master Agent
agents.summary: Directs the run, merges outputs, and keeps blockers visible.
agents.current: Merging lead outputs into one answer path and checking whether any blocked claim still needs another pass.
agents.next: Decide whether to reopen evidence or move directly into the final merge.
recent: Re-ranked lane priority after synthesis exposed a support gap.
Requested a freshness re-check on the benchmark branch.
completed: Split the run into four lanes.

agents.name: Planning Lead
agents.summary: Keeps scope narrow and dependencies explicit.
agents.current: Cleaning up branch boundaries so evidence and synthesis are not repeating the same work.
agents.next: Close the last dependency edge once benchmark normalization lands.
recent: Collapsed two overlapping retrieval tasks.
Marked synthesis as blocked on one normalized benchmark output.
completed: Defined stop conditions for all lead lanes.

agents.name: Evidence Lead
agents.summary: Owns source gathering and claim quality.
agents.current: Reviewing the latest source packets and deciding which claims are strong enough to ship downstream.
agents.next: Release one final normalized benchmark packet if freshness checks pass.
recent: Merged the paper scout packet with benchmark updates.
Dropped two weak claims that did not change the answer.

agents.name: Synthesis Lead
agents.summary: Shapes the final answer and keeps it aligned with the evidence.
agents.current: Reworking the outline around the newest packet while holding two unsupported sections in review.
agents.next: Unlock the final draft pass once citation support clears the open sections.
recent: Condensed the outline from five sections to three blocks.
Moved one weak conclusion back into a caveat section.

agents.name: Audit Lead
agents.summary: Keeps contradictions from slipping through the final merge.
agents.current: Waiting on the refreshed benchmark packet before deciding whether the last blocked conclusion can clear.
agents.next: Run one final contradiction pass across the merged answer.
recent: Blocked one stale benchmark conclusion.
Requested a unit check on the latest metric row.
completed: Escalated the only remaining high-impact conflict.

agents.name: Hypothesis Agent
agents.summary: Refines the question so downstream branches stay specific.
agents.current: Pruning the last edge cases that are no longer changing branch priorities.
agents.next: Freeze the hypothesis set once planning confirms no new branches are needed.
recent: Merged duplicate hypotheses into one axis.
Dropped one branch that was too broad to answer cleanly.
completed: Set the comparison axes for the run.

agents.name: Routing Agent
agents.summary: Tracks which branches can move and which are still blocked.
agents.current: Watching the synthesis and audit blockers so only real scheduling changes reach the master agent.
agents.next: Clear the last blocked edge when the benchmark scout publishes.
recent: Marked synthesis as waiting on one evidence output.
Closed two completed branch edges.
completed: Published the routing board to the master agent.

agents.name: Paper Scout
agents.summary: Turns source material into short claim packets.
agents.current: Compressing the last batch of source notes into claim summaries with provenance attached.
agents.next: Ship a final source packet if the remaining claims stay relevant.
recent: Pulled four usable claims from the latest paper sweep.
Tagged the remaining claims with freshness metadata.
completed: Published one source packet to citation support.

agents.name: Benchmark Scout
agents.summary: Normalizes metrics so the run compares the right numbers.
agents.current: Waiting for one measurement clarification before finalizing the refreshed benchmark packet.
agents.next: Publish the normalized benchmark row back to evidence and audit.
recent: Flagged a unit mismatch in the latest benchmark row.
Prepared a replacement metric packet for review.

agents.name: Narrative Agent
agents.summary: Keeps the output readable while evidence is still moving.
agents.current: Adjusting section order so the answer opens with the strongest supported conclusion.
agents.next: Freeze section order once the final citation pass clears the blocked claims.
recent: Collapsed the intro and summary into one opening.
Moved one weak section into a caveat callout.
completed: Created the section map for the answer.

agents.name: Citation Agent
agents.summary: Matches each answer block to the evidence that supports it.
agents.current: Closing the last two support gaps so synthesis can release the final draft pass.
agents.next: Confirm the replacement benchmark packet and clear the remaining blocker.
recent: Resolved three citation links on the main outline.
Marked two sections as blocked on refreshed evidence.
completed: Linked every stable section to evidence owners.

agents.name: Contradiction Agent
agents.summary: Keeps disagreements visible until the tree resolves them.
agents.current: Re-checking the benchmark conflict against the newest evidence packet before audit clears it.
agents.next: Either clear the conflict or keep the final conclusion blocked.
recent: Matched the stale metric against the replacement packet.
Kept one disagreement open because the unit check is still pending.

contextEntries.summary: Hold the final merge until the benchmark freshness issue is rechecked.
One benchmark row is stale; do not promote it without a fresh source packet.
Outline sections two and three stay blocked until citation support clears the stale benchmark claim.
Audit lane will not clear the final conclusion until the replacement benchmark packet lands.
